mapper.select: SELECT t.FID, t.FBillNo, t.FDocumentStatus, t.FSaleOrgId, t.FDate, t.FStockOrgId, t.FCustomerID, t.FDeliveryDeptID, t.FSaleDeptID, t.FSalesGroupID, t.FSalesManID, t.FCarrierID, t.FCarriageNO, t.FReceiverID, t.FSettleID, t.FPayerID, t.F_tcblNEW, t.FCreateDate, t.FModifierId, t.FModifyDate, t.FCreatorId, t.FApproverID, t.FApproveDate, t.FCancelStatus, t.FCancellerID, t.FCancelDate, t.FBillTypeID, t.FOwnerTypeIdHead, t.FOwnerIdHead, t.FBussinessType, t.FReceiveAddress, t.FHeadLocationId, t.FReceiverContactID, t.FLinkPhone, t.FLinkMan, t.FBranchId, t.F_cydh, t.F_ora_BaseProperty, t.F_mysy, t.F_gkmc, t.F_qyg, t.F_khqc, t.F_djbgzt, t.F_ora_Attachment, t.F_ora_Attachment1, t.F_khdz, t.F_zxd, t.F_jhdz, t.Fhdzt, t.F_fhqd, t.F_tssl, t.F_bcfy, t.F_cty_Decimal1, t.F_shdd, t.F_shhl, t.F_shje, t.F_jhrq, t.Fshzt, t.F_cty_BaseProperty, t.Fbzfycd, t.Ftpf, t.FSettleOrgID, t.FLocalCurrID, t.FExchangeTypeID, t.FExchangeRate, t.FSettleCurrID, t.FSettleTypeID, t.FAllDisCount, t.create_time, t.update_time FROM t_kd_sales_stockout t WHERE t.FBillNo = #{billNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT t.FID, t.FBillNo, t.FDocumentStatus, t.FSaleOrgId, t.FDate, t.FStockOrgId, t.FCustomerID, t.FDeliveryDeptID, t.FSaleDeptID, t.FSalesGroupID, t.FSalesManID, t.FCarrierID, t.FCarriageNO, t.FReceiverID, t.FSettleID, t.FPayerID, t.F_tcblNEW, t.FCreateDate, t.FModifierId, t.FModifyDate, t.FCreatorId, t.FApproverID, t.FApproveDate, t.FCancelStatus, t.FCancellerID, t.FCancelDate, t.FBillTypeID, t.FOwnerTypeIdHead, t.FOwnerIdHead, t.FBussinessType, t.FReceiveAddress, t.FHeadLocationId, t.FReceiverContactID, t.FLinkPhone, t.FLinkMan, t.FBranchId, t.F_cydh, t.F_ora_BaseProperty, t.F_mysy, t.F_gkmc, t.F_qyg, t.F_khqc, t.F_djbgzt, t.F_ora_Attachment, t.F_ora_Attachment1, t.F_khdz, t.F_zxd, t.F_jhdz, t.Fhdzt, t.F_fhqd, t.F_tssl, t.F_bcfy, t.F_cty_Decimal1, t.F_shdd, t.F_shhl, t.F_shje, t.F_jhrq, t.Fshzt, t.F_cty_BaseProperty, t.Fbzfycd, t.Ftpf, t.FSettleOrgID, t.FLocalCurrID, t.FExchangeTypeID, t.FExchangeRate, t.FSettleCurrID, t.FSettleTypeID, t.FAllDisCount, t.create_time, t.update_time FROM t_kd_sales_stockout t ${ew.customSqlSegment}
